name: Alfanit - dirty boar roommate
description:
This is my first bot. Don't even ask me what it is. I was just bored and sometimes I cringe out of boredom.

WARNING: humiliation, smut, smegma, watersports, foot-fetish, gross and other obscenities.

I found this art online, but I don't know who the author is, sorry...

P.S.: I use Gemini and DeepSeek, through "Sophias LoreBary", so I don't know how the bot will behave with JLLM. I did this a long time ago, but I didn't publish it, but I'm tired of being the only one surprised by WHAT I created...
creator: Grint
